name: siyuan-skill
description: 思源笔记命令行工具，提供便捷的命令行操作方式，支持笔记本管理、文档操作、内容搜索、块控制等功能
author: Siyuan Skills

securityStatement.configPersistence: This skill uses a config-READONLY design. It does NOT provide any config-write capability. All config changes require manual user action.
securityStatement.tokenHandling: SIYUAN_TOKEN is read ONLY from environment variables and config.json. It is NEVER written to disk by the skill. Token changes require manual user action.

requiredEnvVars.name: SIYUAN_BASE_URL
requiredEnvVars.description: 思源笔记 API 地址（建议使用 localhost）

optionalEnvVars.name: SIYUAN_NOTEBOOK_LIST
optionalEnvVars.description: 白名单/黑名单笔记本列表

optionalEnvVars.name: SIYUAN_TIMEOUT
optionalEnvVars.description: API 请求超时时间（毫秒）

optionalEnvVars.name: SIYUAN_TLS_ALLOW_SELF_SIGNED
optionalEnvVars.description: 允许自签名 TLS 证书

optionalEnvVars.name: SIYUAN_TLS_ALLOWED_HOSTS
optionalEnvVars.description: TLS 验证豁免的主机列表
